title: oldenlandia viscida
intro: Oldenlandia viscida, also known as sticky crawl grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Oldenlandia viscida have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as having anti-cancer and anti-diabetic effects. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia viscida, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
